name: High Cost Disbursements

columns.name: Year
columns.description: Year of disbursement to carrier.

columns.name: Study Area Code
columns.description: Unique number assigned to each ETC based on its service area. A carrier with multiple service areas within a single state will have multiple SAC.

columns.name: Fund Type
columns.description: Individual High Cost fund in which the carrier participates. See High Cost Funds Glossary for details.

columns.name: FCC Form 498 ID
columns.description: FCC Form 498 ID (also called a Service Provider Identification Number or SPIN) is a unique nine-digit number assigned to a service provider by USAC when the service provider files an FCC Form 498.

columns.name: Amount Disbursed
columns.description: Amount of funding disbursed to carriers. The “amount disbursed” may occasionally show a negative number. This is a result of prior period adjustments, audit recoveries, or other factors.

columns.description: Standard name used to identify a study area. Typically, the study area name is the same as the carrier name.

columns.name: State
columns.description: State abbreviation for carrier receiving High Cost support.

columns.name: Month
columns.description: Month of disbursement to carrier.

description: This dataset provides information about total dollar amounts disbursed by month and year to Eligible Telecommunication Carriers (ETCs) participating in the High Cost Program. The tool displays data for the current year and the previous 10 years. For older data, please email hcquestions@usac.org.

name: Emergency Connectivity Fund FCC Form 471

columns.name: Funding Request Number (FRN)
columns.description: Unique funding request number associated with the ECF FCC Form 471.

columns.name: Last Updated DateTime
columns.description: Exact date and time the ECF FCC Form 471 was last modified (EST).

columns.name: Window Status
columns.description: Indicates whether the application has been certified during the ECF FCC Form 471 application filing window.

columns.name: Certified DateTime
columns.description: Exact date and time (EST) when the ECF FCC Form 471 was certified.

columns.name: Total Funding Commitment Request Amount
columns.description: Funding request amount for applicant across all FRNs.

columns.name: Unmet Student Needs 12 (After ECF funding will lack access to device and connection)
columns.description: Count of students provided by applicant in response to the application question: Even after receiving the funding that you are requesting from the Emergency Connectivity Fund Program, how many students in your school or school district will lack access to both a connected device and a broadband connection that is sufficient to engage in remote learning?

columns.name: Unmet Student Needs 11 (After ECF funding will lack access to connection)
columns.description: Count of students provided by applicant in response to the application question: Even after receiving the funding that you are requesting from the Emergency Connectivity Fund Program, how many students in your school or school district will lack access to a broadband connection that is sufficient to engage in remote learning?

columns.name: Unmet Student Needs 10 (After ECF funding will lack access to device)
columns.description: Count of students provided by applicant in response to the application question: Even after receiving the funding that you are requesting from the Emergency Connectivity Fund Program, how many students in your school or school district will lack access to a connected device that is sufficient to engage in remote learning?

columns.name: Unmet Student Needs 9 (With ECF funding will provide access to device and connection)
columns.description: Count of students provided by applicant in response to the application question: With the funding you are requesting from the Emergency Connectivity Fund Program, how many students in your school or school district will you provide with both a connected device and a broadband connection, because they otherwise would not have had a connected device or a broadband connection that was sufficient to engage in remote learning?

columns.name: Unmet Student Needs 8 (With ECF funding will provide access to connection)
columns.description: Count of students provided by applicant in response to the application question: With the funding you are requesting from the Emergency Connectivity Fund Program, how many students in your school or school district will you provide with a broadband connection, because they otherwise would not have had a broadband connection that was sufficient to engage in remote learning?

columns.name: Unmet Student Needs 7 (With ECF funding will provide access to device)
columns.description: Count of students provided by applicant in response to the application question: With the funding you are requesting from the Emergency Connectivity Fund Program, how many students in your school or school district will you provide with a connected device, because they would otherwise not have a connected device that is sufficient to engage in remote learning?

columns.name: Unmet Student Needs 6 (During 2020-2021 provided access to device and connection)
columns.description: Count of students provided by applicant in response to the application question: During the 2020-2021 school year, how many students in your school or school district did you provide both a connected device and a broadband connection, because they otherwise would not have had a connected device or a broadband connection that was sufficient to engage in remote learning?

columns.name: Unmet Student Needs 5 (During 2020-2021 provided access to connection)
columns.description: Count of students provided by applicant in response to the application question: During the 2020-2021 school year, how many students in your school or school district did you provide a broadband connection, because they otherwise would not have had a broadband connection that was sufficient to engage in remote learning?

columns.name: Unmet Student Needs 4 (During 2020-2021 provided access to device)
columns.description: Count of students provided by applicant in response to the application question: During the 2020-2021 school year, how many students in your school or school district did you provide a connected device, because they otherwise would not have had a connected device that was sufficient to engage in remote learning?

columns.name: Unmet Student Needs 3 (At start of pandemic lacked access to device and connection)
columns.description: Count of students provided by applicant in response to the application question: At the start of the pandemic, how many students in your school or school district lacked access to both a connected device and a broadband connection that were sufficient to engage in remote learning?

columns.name: Unmet Student Needs 2 (At start of pandemic lacked access to connection)
columns.description: Count of students provided by applicant in response to the application question: At the start of the pandemic, how many students in your school or school district lacked access to a broadband connection that was sufficient to engage in remote learning?

columns.name: Unmet Student Needs 1 (At start of pandemic lacked access to device)
columns.description: Count of students provided by applicant in response to the application question: At the start of the pandemic, how many students in your school or school district lacked access to a connected device (laptop or tablet) that was sufficient to engage in remote learning?

columns.name: Total Count of Selected Members
columns.description: For consortium or ESA school district billed entities, the total count of selected members in the application.

columns.name: Selected Members Entity Data
columns.description: For consortium or ESA school district billed entities, the entity data of the selected members on the application. The member entity data includes BEN, name, entity type, total student count, total square footage, and urban/rural status. If multiple member entities are selected in one application, then the entity data is concatenated as a nested array: {BEN1| Name1| Entity Type1| Total Student Count1| Total Square Footage1| Urban/ Rural Status1}, {BEN2| Name2| Entity Type2| Total Student Count2| Total Square Footage2| Urban/ Rural Status2}

columns.name: Urban/ Rural Status
columns.description: Urban/rural status of the billed entity.

columns.name: Total Student Count
columns.description: Student count for the billed entity based on the entity profile.

columns.name: Consulting Firm
columns.description: Consulting firm entity data associated with the application's billed entity. The consulting firm entity data includes name and the consultant's registration number (CRN) assigned by USAC. If multiple consulting firms are associated with one application, then the entity data is concatenated as a nested array: {Name1| CRN1}, {Name2| CRN2}.

columns.name: Contact Email
columns.description: Email address of the main contact provided by the applicant on the ECF FCC Form 471. This contact is used as the first point of contact through the funding request process.

columns.name: Contact Phone
columns.description: Phone number of the main contact provided by the applicant on the ECF FCC Form 471.

columns.name: Contact Name
columns.description: Full name of the main contact provided by the applicant on the ECF FCC Form 471.

columns.name: Applicant Subtype
columns.description: The applicant subtype (or subtypes separated by commas if multiple). Examples include: public school, private school, research library, bookmobile, Tribal school, Tribal library, etc.

columns.name: Applicant Type
columns.description: Applicant type including school, school district, library, library system, or consortium.

columns.name: FCC Registration Number
columns.description: Ten-digit number that the FCC assigns to a business or individual that registers with the FCC.

columns.name: Billed Entity Number (BEN)
columns.description: Billed entity number for the ECF FCC Form 471 applicant.

columns.name: Billed Entity ZIP Code Ext
columns.description: Applicant zip code extension.

columns.name: Billed Entity ZIP code
columns.description: Applicant zip code.

columns.name: Billed Entity State
columns.description: Applicant state.

columns.name: Billed Entity City
columns.description: Applicant city.

columns.name: Billed Entity Address
columns.description: Applicant street address.

columns.name: Applicant Name
columns.description: Name of the applicant's organization (also referred to as the billed entity).

columns.name: Filing Window
columns.description: Identifies the ECF filing window for the application.

columns.name: Application Nickname
columns.description: Nickname given to an ECF FCC Form 471 by an applicant.

columns.name: Application Status
columns.description: Current status of the ECF FCC Form 471. It can be used to filter the following statuses: Certified and Committed.

columns.name: Form PDF
columns.description: Link to download the original submitted ECF FCC Form 471 as a PDF.

columns.name: Form Version
columns.description: Indicates whether the form version of the application is "current" or "original." It can be used to aggregate the data between current and original applications. "Current" is the view of the form processed by USAC. "Original" is the view of the form originally submitted by the applicant upon certification.

columns.name: Application Number
columns.description: Unique application number generated at the time an applicant begins to file the ECF FCC Form 471 application. Applicants can request funding for multiple services under the same application number.

columns.name: FRN Deobligated?
columns.description: An FRN is deobligated for the ECF program after the invoice deadline date has passed and there are no pending post commitment request or invoice lines associated with the FRN.

columns.name: Product Type
columns.description: When the selected service type is equipment, this is the product type for the FRN line item ID. Examples include: laptops, routers, wi-fi hotspots, etc.

columns.name: Product Model
columns.description: Model of the product on FRN line item ID.

columns.name: One-time Unit Quantity
columns.description: Unit quantity for the one-time costs for the FRN line item ID.

columns.name: One-time Unit Cost
columns.description: One-time costs per unit for the FRN line item ID.

columns.name: Network Equipment Type
columns.description: When the selected service type is services with new construction or self-provisioned network, this is the network equipment type for the FRN line item ID.

columns.name: Network Equipment Make/ Model
columns.description: When the selected service type is services with new construction or self-provisioned network, this is the network equipment make and model for the FRN line item ID.

columns.name: Monthly Recurring Unit Cost
columns.description: Monthly recurring costs per unit for the FRN line item ID.

columns.name: Line Total Recurring Costs
columns.description: Total monthly recurring charges for the FRN line item ID.

columns.name: Line Total One-time Costs
columns.description: Total one-time charges for the FRN line item ID.

columns.name: FRN Line Item ID
columns.description: Funding request line item ID number. This is the lowest level of detail of this dataset.

columns.name: Firewall Included
columns.description: When the selected service type is services, indicates if firewall services are included in the FRN line item ID.

columns.name: Connection Type
columns.description: When the selected service type is services, this is the connection type for the FRN line item ID. Examples include: leased lit fiber, cable modem, mobile broadband etc.

columns.name: Bandwidth Upload (Mbps)
columns.description: Internet upload speed of the connection for the FRN line item ID as megabits per second (Mbps).

columns.name: Bandwidth Download (Mbps)
columns.description: Internet download speed of the connection for the FRN line item ID as megabits per second (Mbps).

columns.name: Line Total Cost
columns.description: Total costs for the FRN line item ID.

columns.name: Line Item ID Months of Service
columns.description: Number of months of service entered for the FRN line item ID.

columns.name: Monthly Quantity
columns.description: Unit quantity for the FRN line item ID monthly recurring costs.

columns.name: Product Make
columns.description: Manufacturer of the FRN line item ID product.

columns.name: FRN Authorized Disbursement
columns.description: Total FRN approved authorized disbursement amount that will be paid to the service provider or applicant.

columns.name: FCDL Comment for FRN
columns.description: Explanation of FCDL decision at the FRN level. MR: modification reason; CR: cancellation reason; DR: denial reason.

columns.name: FCDL Date
columns.description: The date of the obligation file that a funding commitment was issued in.

columns.name: Obligation File #
columns.description: A number that indicates in which obligation file the funding commitment was issued in.

columns.name: Service Delivery Date
columns.description: Services must be installed or product must be delivered on or before this date.

columns.name: Invoice Deadline Date
columns.description: Last date an Invoice (BEAR or SPI) can be received.

columns.name: FRN Total Count of Recipients of Service
columns.description: For consortium or ESA school district billed entities, the count of recipients of service in the FRN.

columns.name: FRN Recipients of Service (ROS) Entity Data
columns.description: For consortium or ESA school district billed entities, the entity data of the selected recipients of service (ROS) on the FRN. The ROS entity data includes entity number, name, entity type, city, and state. If multiple ROS entities are selected in one application, then the entity data is concatenated as a nested array: {Entity Number1| Name1| Entity Type1| City1| State1}, {Entity Number2|Name2| Entity Type2| City2| State2}.

columns.name: FRN Approved Amount
columns.description: Total approved amount for a funding request. This field can be aggregated at the FRN level to generate metrics across service type, status or entities. This field should not be used to generate metrics at FRN line item ID level.

columns.name: FRN Total Charges
columns.description: Total charges of a funding request. This field can be aggregated at the FRN level to generate metrics across service type, status or entities. This field should not be used to generate metrics at FRN line item ID level.

columns.name: FRN One-time Charges
columns.description: Total one-time/non-recurring charge of a funding request. This field can be aggregated at the FRN level to generate metrics across service type, status or entities. This field should not be used to generate metrics at FRN line item ID level.

columns.name: FRN Recurring Charges
columns.description: Total monthly recurring charges of a funding request. This field can be aggregated at the FRN level to generate metrics across service type, status or entities. This field should not be used to generate metrics at FRN line item ID level.

columns.name: Funding Request Narrative
columns.description: Narrative for the FRN describing the products and services.

columns.name: New Construction or Self-Provisioned Network
columns.description: Indicates if an FRN includes a request for funding for new construction, a self-provisioned network, and/or datacasting equipment. This does not include monthly recurring costs for either a leased lit fiber service or wireless services.

columns.name: Invoicing Method
columns.description: Type of invoice to be processed for FRN including "Applicant - FCC Form 472 (BEAR Form)" and "Service Provider - FCC Form 474 (SPI Form)".

columns.name: Service End Date
columns.description: Estimated end date of services on ECF FCC Form 471 application. Service end date may impact commitment amount as it could adjust the month of services.

columns.name: Service Start Date
columns.description: Estimated start date of services on ECF FCC Form 471 application. Service start date may impact commitment amount as it could adjust the month of services.

columns.name: Service Provider Identification Number (SPIN)
columns.description: Unique nine-digit number assigned to identify the service provider. If null, the service provided has not registered in the E-rate program.

columns.name: Service Provider Name
columns.description: Service provider name for the FRN.

columns.name: Agreement Type
columns.description: Agreement type for the FRN including non-contracted, contract or tariff.

columns.name: Service Type
columns.description: FRN service type including equipment and services.

columns.name: Funding Request Nickname
columns.description: Nickname given to an FRN from the ECF FCC Form 471 by an applicant.

columns.name: Funding Request Status
columns.description: Status of the funding request. It includes pending, funded, denied or cancelled.

columns.description: Contract number for the FRN. It can used to filter records related to a specific contract number.

columns.description: Number of bids received by the applicant from service providers in the competitive bidding process.

columns.name: Pricing Confidentiality
columns.description: Indicates whether the FRN pricing must be kept confidential and not disclosed to the public.

columns.description: Type of restriction that enable applicants to make pricing information confidential such as State Law or Statute, Local Rule, Court Order, Contract Executed with Restrictive Terms.

columns.name: Pricing Publication Restriction Citation
columns.description: Reference to a local law or contract to support pricing confidentiality requests.

columns.description: Number of months a service is provided during a funding year for an FRN based on the service start date and end date.

columns.description: Total pre-discount eligible non-recurring/one-time charges of a funding request.

columns.description: The total amount for the Funding Request (FRN) after discount.

columns.name: Number of Eligible Fiber Strands
columns.description: Number of eligible fiber strands.

columns.name: Special Construction State/Tribal Match Percentage
columns.description: Percentage of discount that is matched by USAC for fiber FRNs under the state matching provision.

columns.description: Total net amount disbursed to a service provider or applicant.

columns.name: Billed Entity State

columns.name: Period of Fiber installation financing
columns.description: Number of months for financing related to fiber FRNs.

columns.name: Total Remaining Contract Length
columns.description: Number of months left on the contract for the FRN.

columns.description: Form status for the FCC Form 486 including:- Approved: FCC Form 486 and FRN is approved so invoicing may begin- Partially Approved: FCC Form 486 and FRN is partially approved so invoicing may begin for those FRNs approved.

columns.name: Based on Multiple Award Schedule?
columns.description: Indicates whether a Funding Request is tied to a contract with a multiple award schedule.

columns.name: Award based on State Master Contract
columns.description: Indicates whether the contract for the FRN is based on a state master contract.

columns.description: Indicates whether the application has been certified in the window.

columns.name: Application Number

columns.name: Funding Year
columns.description: Funding year for the application.

columns.name: Form Version
columns.description: Indicates whether the form version of the application is "current" or "original." It can be used to aggregate the data between current and original applications. "Current" is the view of the form processed by USAC. "Original" is the view of the form originally submitted by the applicant upon certification.

columns.name: Billed Entity Number
columns.description: Unique number assigned to the billed entity/ applicant.

columns.name: Contact Email
columns.description: Email Address of the main contact provided by the applicant on the FCC Form 471.

columns.name: Post Commitment Rationale
columns.description: Explanation for the funding request decision made for a post commitment transaction.

columns.name: FRN Total One-Time Costs
columns.description: Total one-time/non-recurring charge of a funding request. This field can be aggregated at an FRN level to generate metrics across service type or entities. This field should not be used to generate metrics at FRN line Item level.

columns.name: Wave Date
columns.description: The date of the wave that a funding commitment was issued in.

columns.name: Invoicing Ready?
columns.description: Invoicing may begin for the FRN as there is an approved FCC Form 486.

columns.name: Total Strands Quantity
columns.description: Number of actual glass optical fibers inside the cable sheath.

columns.name: Fiber Sub Type
columns.description: Fiber subtypes for fiber FRNs.  Options include maintenance and operation, network equipment, network equipment and maintenance, or special construction.

columns.name: Equipment Leased
columns.description: Indicates whether FRN is for leased dark fiber or IRU (Indefensible Right of Use).

columns.name: Total Project Plant Route Feet
columns.description: Total distance between a demark point at an applicant’s location and a service provider’s switching facility or point of presence measured in feet.

columns.name: Fiber Average Cost per Foot
columns.description: Average cost of cabling, infrastructure, and associated hardware divided by the total project plant route feet.

columns.name: Special Construction State/Tribal Match Amount
columns.description: Program provides 1 to 1 dollar match amount in extra Category One fiber special construction funding up to an additional ten percent discount.

columns.name: Source of Matching fund
columns.description: Funding source when the applicant is seeking a state match for fiber FRNs.  The E-rate program will provide additional Category One funding (up to 10%) to match state funding for special construction to connect schools and libraries to high-speed broadband services that meet the FCC's long-term capacity broadband goals.

columns.name: Fiber Installation Cost
columns.description: Amount financed for fiber FRNs.

columns.name: Annual Fiber Interest Rate
columns.description: Annual Interest Rate Associated with a Fiber Application.

columns.name: Balloon Payment
columns.description: Balance due payment made at the end of the financing period for fiber installation.

columns.name: Service Provider Number
columns.description: A unique nine-digit number assigned to identify the service provider.

columns.name: Voluntary Contract Extension
columns.description: Indicates whether the contact has voluntary extensions that can be exercised by the applicant for the FRN.

columns.name: Remaining Contract Extension
columns.description: Remaining number of contract extensions for the FRN.

columns.name: Previous unique FRN
columns.description: Funding Request Number from a previous fund year that is related to the FRN.

columns.name: FCC Form 471 Service Start Date

columns.name: Service Type
columns.description: FRN service type including voice, data transmission and/or Internet access, basic maintenance of internal connections, internal connections, or managed internal broadband services.

columns.name: Contract Expiration Date
columns.description: Contract expiration date for the FRN. If the FRN is for a tariff or month-to-month service this field displays the service end date. This field can be used to filter the 471 applications that have active contracts.

columns.name: Funding Request Narrative
columns.description: Narrative for the FRN describing the products and services.

columns.name: FRN Total Monthly Recurring Ineligible Costs
columns.description: Total pre-discount ineligible monthly recurring charges of a funding request. This field can be aggregated at an FRN level to generate metrics across service type or entities. This field should not be used to generate metrics at FRN line Item level.

columns.name: FRN Total Monthly Recurring Eligible Costs
columns.description: Total pre-discount eligible monthly recurring charges of a funding request. This field can be aggregated at an FRN level to generate metrics across service type or entities. This field should not be used to generate metrics at FRN line Item level.

columns.name: Wave Sequence Number
columns.description: A number that indicates which wave sequence the funding commitment was issued in.

columns.name: Appeal Wave Number
columns.description: A number that indicates which appeal wave the revised funding decision was issued in.

name: Rural Health Care Commitments and Disbursements (FCC Form 462/466/466A)

columns.name: Participating HCP
columns.description: Unique number assigned by USAC to the Participating HCP receiving services.

columns.name: Reliability
columns.description: Indicates the guaranteed availability (as a percentage) of end-to-end network functionality.

columns.name: Packet Loss
columns.description: Indicates the percentage of packets that are dropped or discarded before reaching their destination.

columns.name: Gross Demand
columns.description: The original amount an applicant requests with their FCC Form 462, 466, 466A.

columns.name: Filing Window
columns.description: Filing window information associated with submitted funding requests.

columns.name: Funding Submission Date
columns.description: Date the funding request was submitted.

columns.name: Funding Start Date
columns.description: Date the funding starts.

columns.name: Monthly Urban Rate
columns.description: Monthly urban rate for the service. Only applicable to Telecommunications program funding requests.

columns.name: Number of Bidders
columns.description: Number of service providers that bid on the request for services. A blank field means “not applicable” either because the information is not currently available from the applicant, .e.g., for Telecommunications program requests, or because the applicant claimed a competitive bidding exemption under the HCF Program.  Zero means no bids were received.

columns.name: Download Speed
columns.description: Download speed requested by an HCF Program applicant. If “NA,” then relates to service where bandwidth is not applicable, e.g., network equipment.

columns.name: Filing HCP County
columns.description: County where filing HCP is located

columns.name: Filing HCP Street
columns.description: Street address where Filing HCP is located.

columns.name: FRN Line Number
columns.description: FRN line number can be used to filter the records associated with a specific FRN, i.e., the FRN Line Number helps to identify a particular record when there are multiple record entries associated with the same FRN, which can occur with HCF Program requests. If field states “unallocated,” then support is not yet allocated to a specific site.

columns.name: Prorata Factor
columns.description: Percentage of each qualifying funding request that will be approved for commitment.

columns.name: Program
columns.description: RHC is comprised of two programs: Health Care Connect Fund (HCF) and Telecommunications program. This field specifies which program the applicant applied for.

columns.name: Fund Type
columns.description: Indicates whether the funding request is for an individual health care provider (HCP) or a consortium. This field defaults to 'Individual' for the Telecommunications program.

columns.name: Funding Year
columns.description: Funding year for the application. The RHC funding year runs from July 1 to June 30.

columns.name: Funding Request Number
columns.description: A unique number assigned by USAC for each funding request submitted through FCC Forms 462, 466, and 466A. It can be used as a primary reference to extract additional information related to the funding request.

columns.name: Status
columns.description: Status of FCC Forms 462, 466, and 466A. Only approved FCC Forms are currently displayed in this dataset.

columns.name: Filing HCP
columns.description: Unique number assigned by USAC to the consortium or individual entity that filed the request seeking funding for supported services.

columns.name: Filing HCP State
columns.description: State where Filing HCP is located.

columns.name: Invoice Deadline Date
columns.description: Indicates the last day to submit invoice(s) to USAC.

columns.name: Latency
columns.description: Indicates, in milliseconds, the delay between sending and receiving a packet.

columns.name: Jitter
columns.description: Indicates the difference in the end-to-end delay (latency) between received packets of an IP or packet stream.

columns.name: Service Level Agreement
columns.description: Indicates whether the applicant reported Service Level Agreement on the block 28 of Form 462.

columns.name: Total Authorized Disbursement Amount
columns.description: Dollars to date paid out by USAC for the funding request.

columns.name: Filing HCP Name
columns.description: Name of the HCP entity that filed the request seeking funding for supported services.

columns.name: Filing HCP Entity Type
columns.description: Indicates the Entity Type filling for service.

columns.name: Filing HCP City
columns.description: City where Filing HCP is located.

columns.name: Filing HCP Zip Code
columns.description: Zip code where Filing HCP is located.

columns.name: Filing HCP Latitude
columns.description: System-generated latitude for Filing HCP’s physical address.

columns.name: Filing HCP Longitude
columns.description: System-generated longitude for Filing HCP’s physical address.

columns.name: Participating HCP Name
columns.description: Name of the Participating HCP receiving services.

columns.name: Participating HCP Entity Type
columns.description: Indicates the Entity Type receiving service.

columns.name: Participating HCP Street
columns.description: Street address where Participating HCP site is located.

columns.name: Participating HCP City
columns.description: City where Participating HCP site is located.

columns.name: Participating HCP State
columns.description: State where Participating HCP site is located.

columns.name: Participating HCP County
columns.description: Participating HCP County

columns.name: Participating HCP Zip Code
columns.description: Zip code where Participating HCP site is located.

columns.name: Participating HCP Latitude
columns.description: System-generated latitude for the Participating HCP site address associated with the service request.

columns.name: Participating HCP Longitude
columns.description: System-generated longitude of the Participating HCP site address associated with the service request.

columns.name: Category of Expense
columns.description: Indicates the category of expense (e.g. leased/tariffed facilities or services, network equipment) for which the funding is requested. Not applicable for the Telecommunications program.

columns.name: Original Committed Amount
columns.description: The original amount that USAC will provide for the funding request.

columns.name: Service Provider Name
columns.description: Full legal name of a service provider.

columns.name: Service Type
columns.description: Service type for which the funding is requested.

columns.name: Bandwidth
columns.description: Bandwidth speed requested by applicant.  Bandwidth field will be used for all Telecom applicants, and for HCF applicant only if the bandwidth (upload/download) requested is symmetrical.

columns.name: Upload Speed
columns.description: Upload speed requested by an HCF Program applicant. If “NA,” then relates to service where bandwidth is not applicable, e.g., network equipment.

columns.name: Frequency of Expense
columns.description: Indicates the frequency of expense for the service an applicant is requesting. The applicant may specify the frequency as month, quarter, one-time, or year. This field defaults to "Month" for the Telecommunications program.

columns.name: Multi-Year Funding
columns.description: Indicates if the applicant is seeking a multi-year funding commitment in the HCF Program. However, applicants seeking support for $10,000 or less of annual undiscounted cost are not eligible for multi-year funding commitments. Not applicable for the Telecommunications program.

columns.name: Eligible Service
columns.description: Portion of a connection that is eligible for support. When a connection is used by both eligible and ineligible sites, an applicant needs to indicate the portion of usage that is eligible for support.

columns.name: Eligible Site
columns.description: Indicates if the HCP site is eligible for support. Each HCP site or location is considered an individual HCP for the purposes of calculating support.

columns.name: Quantity of Item Invoiced
columns.description: Number of items an applicant is requesting. Not applicable for the Telecommunications program.

columns.name: Monthly Rural Rate
columns.description: Monthly rural rate for the service. Only applicable to Telecommunications program funding requests. If the monthly recurring rate is lower than rural rate, then the rural rate may not be used for commitment calculation.

columns.name: Funding End Date
columns.description: Date the funding terminates.

columns.name: Funding Commitment Date
columns.description: Date the funding request was committed.

columns.name: Service Provider ID
columns.description: A unique nine-digit number assigned to a service provider by USAC when the service provider files an FCC Form 498. Every service provider is required to have a 498 ID in order to participate in any universal service program and/or receive payments from USAC.

columns.name: Total Committed Amount
columns.description: Total amount USAC will provide for the funding request.

It may run education programs in facilities that are not recognized as elementary or secondary schools. columns.description: A facility with a comprehensive child development program that serves preschool-age children and their families.

columns.name: Juvenile Justice
columns.description: A NIF which is (and should be) labeled as a school in EPC, but usually has within it a primary or secondary education program.

columns.name: Swing Space
columns.description: An institution that temporarily houses students from a school which is considered the "main entity" or original location of the student population.

columns.name: Detention Center
columns.description: A facility that is treated in the same way as a juvenile justice facility.

columns.name: General-Use School
columns.description: A school that offers instruction to students drawn from other schools, and student counts can change throughout the year.

description: This dataset contains information from the service provider's profile in the EPC system (E-Rate Productivity System), which uses information that the service provider provides on the FCC Form 498, in addition to data inputted directly into the EPC system by the user. This dataset also includes basic information about the service provider's interaction with the FCC Form 473 (SPAC) and the FCC Form 499.

name: Cybersecurity Pilot FCC Form 471

columns.name: FCC Registration Number

columns.name: NSLP Percentage

columns.name: NSLP Count
columns.description: Total number of eligible NSLP students.  It can be used to filter applications submitted by the total number of eligible NSLP students. For consortia applications, it is the total number of students for the selected members on the FCC Form 484 Part 1.

columns.name: Fulltime Enrollment
columns.description: Number of fulltime students enrolled at the school or school district. For consortia applications, it is the total number of student for the selected members on the Pilot FCC Form 484 Part 1.

columns.name: Pilot FCC Form 471 Certified Date/Time

columns.name: Latitude

columns.description: Total pre-discount one-time tax cost.

columns.name: Line Item Monthly Quantity

columns.name: Line Item Months of Service
columns.description: Number of months a service is provided for a Line Item. This is based on the service start date and end date.

columns.description: Unique ID for the funding request line item.

columns.description: Total amount the participant is responsible to pay based on the non-discounted share of eligible and ineligible amounts.

columns.name: Contract Expiration Date
columns.description: Contract expiration date for the FRN.  If the FRN is for a month-to-month service this field displays the service end date.

Based on U.S. Census data, every school or library in the United States is located in either an urban or rural area. For consortia applications, it is based on the urban/rural status of the majority of the selected members on the FCC Form 484 Part 1.

columns.name: FRN Status

name: CAF Locations Obligation and Deployment by Speed Tier Data

columns.name: Holding Company
columns.description: The parent company overseeing the carrier responsible for the deployment or in its absence, carrier name.

columns.name: Milestone Locations Obligation
columns.description: Number of locations the carrier must reach with broadband in the state to meet fund-specific deployment requirements by a designated year.

columns.name: Obligated Speed Tier
columns.description: Minimum required speed tier provided at the location, which may exceed but not fall below required levels.

columns.name: Total Locations Obligation
columns.description: Number of locations to which the carrier must deploy broadband, for the fund, in the state.

columns.name: Locations Deployed in Filing Year
columns.description: Total number of locations receiving CAF funds deployed within the corresponding filing year.

columns.name: Fund
columns.description: Individual High Cost fund in which the carrier participates. See High Cost Funds Glossary for details.

columns.name: Study Area Code
columns.description: The 6-digit Study Area Code (SAC) is a unique number assigned to each Eligible Telecommunications Carrier (ETC) based on its service area. A carrier with multiple service areas within a single state will have multiple SACs.

columns.name: Milestone Percentage
columns.description: Percentage of the total required locations that the carrier must deploy broadband to by a specific deadline, which varies by fund requirements.

columns.name: Carrier
columns.description: Standard name used to identify a study area. Typically, the carrier name is the same as the company name.

columns.name: Locations Deployed Cumulative
columns.description: Total number of locations receiving CAF funds deployed  within the corresponding filing year and prior years.

columns.name: State
columns.description: State abbreviation for carrier receiving High Cost support.

columns.name: Filing Year
columns.description: Year when data was reported in High Cost Universal Broadband (HUBB) portal.

tags: connect america fund phase ii auction
description: This dataset provides details at the Study Area Code (SAC) level about the number of locations that Eligible Telecommunications Carriers (ETCs) participating in the Connect America Fund (CAF) have deployed with CAF support at each obligated speed tier, and the total number of locations that carriers must deploy by the end of the program at each obligated speed tier.
